query: SELECT ir.questionId, ir.section, LEFT(ir.response, 500) as response FROM intakeResponses ir JOIN organizations o ON ir.organizationId = o.id WHERE o.slug = 'RRAL' AND (ir.questionId LIKE '%CONN%' OR ir.questionId LIKE '%conn%' OR ir.section LIKE '%connect%' OR ir.section LIKE '%network%') ORDER BY ir.questionId;
